positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration of a serene forest scene viewed through a geometric kaleidoscope. The central subject is a majestic, stylized woodland creature (like a fox or deer) rendered in clean, interlocking geometric shapes and lines, giving it a Bauhaus-meets-Art-Nouveau aesthetic. Include elements of deep emerald green foliage, sapphire blue mystical light beams, and accents of metallic copper and gold foil texture. The composition must be perfectly circular and centered, suitable for a t-shirt graphic. The style should be high-contrast vector art with thick, uniform outlines, flat colors with gradient highlights, and a strong sense of symmetrical balance. Overhead studio lighting, maximal clarity, clean silhouette.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low quality, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, out of frame, monochrome, cartoon, photorealistic
